notes:
Game may work as is. If you recieve a unable to connect issue after character selection, use an adhoc network such as a hot spot from a phone or if you have a hard wired pc with wifi that will work as well.

If game crashes on log in, move character out of town. It is not recommended to teleport to a town as this causes chrashes as well. You can run into town once loged in.

Was able to install and run the game up to character creation, but was not able to log in due to the above issue.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT (navi10, LLVM 14.0.6, DRM 3.42, 5.15.71-1-MANJARO)
notes:
Graphics looked mostly nice, except for a lot of jerkiness, but it just won't let you play since it can't seem to load the EasyAntiCheat libraries.  Maybe one has to purchase this game directly from Amazon to make it work.

Also, I found it concerning that all the servers reported long ping times.  I am located just north of where US-EAST-1 is located, yet my ping times were rated terrible by the game.  As I work with US-EAST-1 all the time, I know the ping times should be excellent, so ... ?
title: New World: Aeternum

notes: Works well, if you can tolerate some frame drops
title: New World: Aeternum
